identity.title: The mark stays quiet until the lockup needs it.
identity.copy: The Maze Gate U Cut is the saved mark. On the landing page, it lives as the identity lockup and as a dim, frosted background presence behind the broadcast, never as a hard symbol in the center of the scene.
